message:
Add path resolution, pattern compilation, and encoder result caches

Three new caching layers to reduce redundant work in hot paths:

identity.rs: Add OnceLock-guarded path resolution cache (cap 2048,
2s freshness) for resolve_path(). Absolute paths that were recently
canonicalized skip the fs::canonicalize syscall. Stale entries are
evicted when canonicalization fails. Includes test for cache
revalidation after symlink re-target.

pattern_overlap.rs: Add thread-local PatternCache (cap 256, LRU)
for compiled glob patterns. patterns_overlap() now reuses compiled
patterns across calls. Also: single-pass normalize_pattern()
replacing repeated String::replace, precomputed is_glob and
first_literal_segment_end fields on CompiledPattern, fast-path
for two-exact-literal overlap via directory prefix check, and
early disjointness exit on differing first literal segments.

toon.rs: Add EncoderValidationCache (cap 16) caching validated
encoder binary paths so --help/--version checks run once per
unique command. Add EncoderResultCache (cap 64, max 16KB payload)
caching full EncoderSuccess results keyed by command+stats+payload,
avoiding repeated subprocess invocations for identical inputs.
apply_tool_format() refactored to call run_encoder() directly.

toon_bench.rs: Add cache-miss benchmark variants using 2048 unique
payloads. New benchmark groups for identity resolution and pattern
overlap operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
